rows.notes: P73 runs only after P72 lands the archive-polish explicit-stop handoff sidecar.
P73 should run from the preferred D:/zWenbo/AI/wt path, not from the legacy worktree prefix or dirty root main.
README, STATUS, and current stage driver should expose P73 as the current local hygiene/shrink lane above the preserved P72 handoff branch.
The docs routers should expose the current shrink wave, design doc, and milestone entrypoints.
The branch/worktree registry should make the preferred path explicit and restrict the legacy prefix to preserved history or shrink candidates.
The keep-set and shrink runbook should make the safety boundary explicit before any local removal step.
The next plan-mode handoff surfaces should reflect the post-shrink state rather than the earlier pre-shrink P72 state.
Every legacy-path worktree should land in exactly one current category.
The current live keep-set should not accidentally remain under the legacy worktree prefix.
